title: rosa × umbelliflora var. typica
intro: Rosa × umbelliflora var. typica, also known as the Rosa × fragrans var. typica or Rosa × fragrans, is a type of fragrant, pink to white flowering rose plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Rosa × umbelliflora var. typica include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. Rosa × umbelliflora var. typica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote relaxation and relieve symptoms associated with colds and flu.
